name: ENA (Joel G vers.)
description:
My scam bot reached 2k, so as promised, I made a similar bot; ENA but she's in your computer!

This bot is basically the same as Scam, except a full character change and less smut. (Unless you make it, of course.)

If anything goes wrong, let me know and I'll try to fix it. Also, I'm still taking suggestions.

And if this bot reaches 3k, I'll make a Dream BBQ version.
